id.description: Sets the id of this node. Important: If you want to set the id of the route, then you must use routeId(String) instead.

note.description: Sets the note of this node

description.description: Sets the description of this node

consumes.description: The content type the REST service accepts (consumes) as input, such as application/xml or application/json.

produces.description: The content type the REST service produces (uses for output), such as application/xml or application/json.

bindingMode.description: Sets the binding mode to use.

type.label: advanced
type.description: Sets the class name to use for binding from input to POJO for the incoming data.

outType.label: advanced
outType.description: Sets the class name to use for binding from POJO to output for the outgoing data.

skipBindingOnErrorCode.label: advanced
skipBindingOnErrorCode.description: Whether to skip binding on output if there is a custom HTTP error code header. This allows to build custom error messages that do not bind to json / xml etc, as success messages otherwise will do.

clientRequestValidation.label: advanced
clientRequestValidation.description: Whether to enable validation of the client request to check whether Content-Type/Accept headers, required parameters, and message body are valid.

clientResponseValidation.label: advanced
clientResponseValidation.description: Whether to validate what Camel is returning as response to the client, such as checking status-code, Content-Type, and headers match the Rest DSL response definition.

enableCORS.label: advanced
enableCORS.description: Whether to enable CORS headers in the HTTP response.

enableNoContentResponse.label: advanced
enableNoContentResponse.description: Whether to return HTTP 204 with an empty body when a response contains an empty JSON object or XML root object.

component.label: advanced
component.description: Sets the component name that this definition will apply to.
